# Speed Potion

## Description

Gain 5 Dexterity. At the end of your turn, lose 5 Dexterity.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.

- Strong emergency block potion for one large attack turn; save for elites/bosses unless a hallway turn threatens severe HP loss or lethal.
